name: EVkids Digest Agent
description: Compiles a personalised weekly digest email for each opted-in student. No LLM involved — uses the same rule-based scorer as the Personalizer to rank opportunities, then renders a deterministic Jinja2 template. Fully idempotent per ISO-week: running the agent twice in the same week produces exactly one draft per student. Output goes through the same pending-approval queue as all other drafts.

extensions.evkids:opportunity_filter: future-dated + rolling deadline, not needs_review, not is_duplicate

card_data.name: EVkids Digest Agent
card_data.description: Generates a weekly summary email for each opted-in student. Uses rule-based match scoring to select and rank the top 5 opportunities, renders via Jinja2 templates (no LLM), and queues as pending-approval DraftMessages. Idempotent per student per ISO-week.

skills.name: Build and Queue Weekly Digests
skills.description: For each opted-in student, scores all available opportunities, selects the top 5 (min score 0.5), renders a personalised text + HTML digest, and persists a DraftMessage with opportunity_id='digest:{week_key}'. Safe to run multiple times in the same week — will not produce duplicate drafts.

when.description: Reference timestamp for week calculation. Defaults to now (UTC).

top_picks.description: Number of opportunities included in this student's digest

examples: Run weekly digest for all students — ISO week 24 2026
Preview digest for student_maya before queuing

skills.name: Preview Digest for Single Student
skills.description: Renders (but does not persist) a digest for a single student. Used by the admin dashboard to preview before triggering a full run.
examples: Preview this week's digest for Jordan Williams
Check what opportunities would appear in Maya's next email
